description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in semi-formal urban attire, featuring a fitted blazer with a decorative shoulder accessory and a graphic t-shirt underneath. The blazer has a unique design on the back, possibly a stylized dragon or serpent motif, adding a fashionable flair. He wears cropped, slim-fit pants that end above the ankles, paired with dark, heeled dress shoes. The figure has a choker necklace and a layered hairstyle with a side part, giving a modern, trendy appearance. His arms are slightly extended outward, and his posture is upright and relaxed. The overall look suggests a fashionable city dweller, possibly a young professional or artist.
description: A fashionable adult male in a semi-formal blazer, graphic t-shirt, cropped pants, and dress shoes, with a modern hairstyle and decorative accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blazer's open front, graphic t-shirt, choker necklace, and the decorative shoulder accessory.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the slim fit of the blazer and pants, as well as the heeled shoes and layered hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the unique design on the back of the blazer and the overall fit of the clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, the choker, and the cropped pants.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted blazer with decorative shoulder accessory, graphic t-shirt, cropped slim-fit pants, choker necklace
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: short layered hair with a side part
